title: arundarbor pallida
intro: Arundarbor pallida, also known as the silver buffalo berry, is a shrubby plant native to the deserts and grasslands of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arundarbor pallida include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Arundarbor pallida include making tea from the leaves and berries, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
